overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a coastal highway at night in GTA V. The camera moves steadily along the road shoulder as various vehicles including trucks, cars, and motorcycles pass by with headlights illuminating the scene. The environment transitions from a concrete barrier section to a metal guardrail section with the moon becoming visible over the rocky hillside.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway shoulder with concrete barrier

events.description: large truck passes very close to camera with bright headlights
police car with flashing red and blue lights drives past

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder next to the concrete barrier, facing oncoming traffic

notable_agents.action: large semi-truck passing close by with headlights illuminating the road
police cruiser with flashing emergency lights driving past

entered.detail: white concrete safety barrier separating the shoulder from the coastal drop-off
multi-lane asphalt road with visible lane markings
dark rocky terrain rising on the inland side of the highway

segments.scene_description: Walking along a coastal highway at night beside a concrete barrier. Vehicles including a large truck and a police car with flashing lights pass by on the right, their headlights cutting through the darkness. The rocky hillside rises in the distance on the right while the ocean is visible beyond the barrier on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving coastal highway with metal guardrail

events.description: concrete barrier ends and transitions to metal guardrail along the road shoulder
road begins to curve to the right along the coastline

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway shoulder as the road curves, with metal guardrail now on the left

notable_agents.action: black sports car speeding past with headlights on

entered.detail: silver metal guardrail with reflective markers replacing the concrete barrier

segments.scene_description: The concrete barrier gives way to a metal guardrail as the highway begins to curve along the coast. The rocky hillside on the right draws closer while vehicles continue to pass by. The road markings become more visible as the camera follows the curve of the highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway curve with moonlit rocky hillside

events.description: full moon rises into view over the rocky hillside on the right
white truck passes by slowly on the curve

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved section of highway with the moon now visible in the night sky

notable_agents.action: white box truck passing by on the curved section of road

entered.detail: bright full moon visible in the night sky above the rocky hillside

segments.scene_description: The moon becomes visible over the rocky hillside, casting additional light on the scene. The camera continues along the curving highway with the metal guardrail on the left. A white truck passes by as the road winds along the coastal terrain under the moonlit sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a coastal highway at night that transitions from a concrete-lined road into a moonlit curve along a rocky hillside. It begins beside a concrete barrier with the ocean to the left, as the headlights of passing vehicles and the flashing lights of a police car cut through the darkness. As the camera moves forward, the concrete barrier gives way to a metal guardrail while the highway begins to curve, bringing the rocky hillside on the right closer into view. The scene then opens up as the moon emerges over the hillside, casting a pale glow across the winding road and the passing white truck. Finally, the camera continues to follow the bend of the highway, tracing the visible road markings under the moonlit sky.
